text:
Created attachment 251713
v1

signal-desktop-6.37.0-npm-cache.tar.gz does not exist in its MASTER_SITES and the DISTVERSION is hard-coded. Update to the matching 7.13.0 version.

The distfile is available at https://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/tmp/signal-desktop-7.13.0-npm-cache.tar.gz
